_comment: C10 Phase 0A — Memorandum for the Record with subject line
title: MEMORANDUM FOR THE RECORD

body.text: This memorandum documents the proper disposal procedures for classified materials within the activity. All personnel handling classified information must adhere to the procedures outlined below.

Classified materials shall be disposed of using approved shredding equipment or burned in accordance with security guidelines. Personnel must ensure that all classified materials are properly accounted for before disposal.

children.text: Documents marked CONFIDENTIAL or higher require witness verification during disposal.
A disposal log must be maintained documenting the date, material type, and method of disposal.

body.text: Questions regarding classified material disposal should be directed to the Security Manager.
